common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
common.name: Name
error.circularReference: Cannot perform the operation due to a circular reference
error.duplicateFolderPath: A folder with the same path is already registered
error.duplicateTagName: A tag with the same name already exists
error.scanInProgress: A scan is already in progress
error.tagInUnsavedEdit: This tag is placed in the view hierarchy being edited and cannot be deleted. Remove the placement or cancel the edit first
error.tagInUse: This tag is in use and cannot be deleted. Remove it from images and views first
error.unhandled: An unexpected error occurred. See the application log for details.
filelist.atMaxNote: Maximum {max} columns. Remove a column to add another.
folder.deleteConfirm: Delete sync folder "{name}"? Image records under it and their tag assignments will also be deleted.
folder.scanSummary: Scan complete: added {added} / updated {updated} / missing {missing} / pending {pending} / skipped {skipped}
hierarchy.closeConfirm.message: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and exit?
hierarchy.closeConfirm.title: Unsaved changes
hierarchy.conditionDialog.title: Placed Tag Settings
hierarchy.dropToAdd: Click or drag from the tag palette to place tags
hierarchy.expansionMode.label: Expansion mode — source of value nodes
hierarchy.expansionNote.defined: Expands the tag's defined values (predefined list / numeric range) in definition order. Value nodes are generated even with zero images, keeping the structure stable.
hierarchy.expansionNote.definedAndObserv: Defined values come first in definition order, followed by assigned values outside the definition (in code-point order).
hierarchy.expansionNote.manual: No value nodes are generated automatically. Only the tag-name node is shown.
hierarchy.expansionNote.observed: Generates value nodes from actually assigned values (default, current behavior). The set of values follows the tagging state.
hierarchy.expansionWarning.numeric: Defined values cannot be generated because the numeric range (min, max, step) is not set. This node falls back to observed values.
hierarchy.expansionWarning.textual: Defined values cannot be generated because no predefined values are set. This node falls back to observed values.
hierarchy.guideHome: Hover a row to reveal the home icon — one click sets it as home (one per view; clicking the current home row clears it). Row actions pause while placing.
hierarchy.guideMenu: Actions on placed tags (set home, rename, set condition, remove) are collected in the row's "⋯" menu; state is shown as HOME / condition chips.
hierarchy.guidePlace: Click a tag in the palette on the right and the insertable positions light up in the tree. Click between rows for a sibling, or "+ Nest as child" on a row to nest. Drag & drop places with the same insertion display.
hierarchy.helpViewUsage: The composed view is applied to collections as a "viewpoint" in the Images tab.
hierarchy.hideEmptyValues: Hide value nodes with no images
hierarchy.homeSetTitle: Set as home (moves from another row)
hierarchy.movingBanner: Moving "{tagName}" — drop on a highlighted spot
hierarchy.placeHint: Pick in the palette / drag to place & reorder
hierarchy.saveBar.guard: Save or discard your changes before moving on
merge.addAtLeastOne: Add at least one image to organize
merge.noCandidates: No candidates to merge. Pick from the grid or search below.
merge.pickTargetHint: Pick the one to keep in the grid to make it the merge target.
merge.undoHint: Undo the last merge (only if nothing changed after the merge)
package.addOnlyNote: Additions only — nothing is deleted. Importing never removes your existing tags or images.
package.compatible: Compatible — this version can import the package
package.conflictsBlock: {count} tag conflict(s) unresolved. Resolve them to run the import.
package.imagesTitle: Images (matched by reference — no image bytes in the package)
package.majorityAccept: I checked the target. Continue and register as missing
package.majorityWarn: Most images are unresolved. The target root (collection) may be wrong.
package.mapCompatNote: "Assign to existing" only offers tags whose value type is compatible.
package.metadataNote: Image entries carry file_size and created/modified dates (needed to restore unresolved items as missing rows).
package.missingDoneNote: Unresolved images were registered as missing rows (tags preserved). When the files appear, the next scan proposes candidates and confirming in the repair screen links them.
package.missingNote: Unresolved (not found) images are registered as missing rows and enter the existing repair flow. The next scan proposes candidates; confirming in the repair screen links them (tags preserved).
package.noImagesRest: Only tags and metadata (references to images) are exported. Views are not included because they can span multiple collections. The importing side matches these references.
package.resultSummary: Imported {package} into {collection}. No existing data was deleted.
package.stateChangedSub: Treated as conflict; import by explicit action only
pending.emptyDesc: When a scan finds content changes or new files, you can review them here.
pending.title: Pending images — {name}
pending.whyCandidateDesc: To treat them as the same image, choose "Relink in repair" to carry over its tags.
pending.whyCandidateLead: A missing image with the same content exists
pending.whyChangedDesc: It cannot be determined whether it was edited or replaced with another image. Review the image and choose.
pending.whyChangedLead: The content differs from when it was registered
pending.whyNewDesc: Accepting it will manage it as a regular image.
pending.whyNewLead: A new image found by scanning
pending.whyReappearedDesc: It cannot be determined whether the same image returned or a different one was placed. Review the image and choose.
pending.whyReappearedLead: A file reappeared at the path of a missing image
pending.whyRestoredDesc: Review the current file content and choose whether to accept it.
pending.whyRestoredLead: This image was restored from the trash
relink.confirmMessage: Tags and notes will be carried over to the missing image. Commit the relink?
relink.title: Relink
repair.criteria.help: Refines relink candidates by the selected missing image's criteria. Edit and press Search to re-search.
repair.criteria.name: File name (contains)
repair.criteria.title: Criteria search
repair.relink.confirmMessage: Tags and notes will be carried over to the missing image. Commit the relink?
repair.relink.title: Relink
repair.title: Repair
scan.applyConfirmMessage: This will change the state of {count} images. After applying, {missing} images will need repair. Image files themselves are not modified.
scan.rateDescRed: Most images cannot be found. Check that the drive is connected and the scanned folder is correct. If this is unexpected, we recommend discarding these results.
scan.rateDescYellow: A sizable number of images cannot be found. If you moved or reorganized folders, you can restore links with the repair tools after applying.
scan.stagingNote: Scanning does not modify the database. If you cancel, all results so far are discarded.
scan.workloadCandidates: {count} of them already have relink candidates.
scan.workloadLead: After applying, {missing} images will need repair
scan.workloadLeadBoth: After applying, {missing} images will need repair and {pending} will need review
scan.workloadLeadPending: After applying, {pending} images will need review
settings.dataBackup.description: Preserve and transfer settings, tags, views, and metadata. All manual; image files are never included.
settings.dataBackup.exportSub: Choose a collection and write a .viewprism2-collection.json
settings.dataBackup.importSub: Verify the package and merge additively
settings.dataBackup.note: Existing data is never deleted (import only adds).
settings.dataBackup.title: Data & Backup
settings.general.languageDescription: Select your preferred language for the application interface
settings.general.title: General Settings
settings.title: Settings
similar.title: Similar Image Search
snapshot.description: Saves tag definitions, view structures, and metadata exactly as they are at this point in time.
snapshot.noImagesNote: Image files are not included. The snapshot covers tag definitions, view structures, and metadata (including references to images). The actual images stay where they are.
snapshot.restoreExecute: Restore to This Point and Restart
snapshot.restoreFailedStatus: Restore failed; started with the previous state: {message}
snapshot.restoreHeading: Roll back the entire database to this point
snapshot.restoreNoImagesNote: Image files are not part of the restore. Only tags, views, and metadata roll back; the actual images stay untouched.
snapshot.restoreRestartNote: ViewPrism2 must restart to complete the restore. It will restart automatically after you proceed.
snapshot.restoreRollbackNote: If the restore fails, the current state is brought back automatically (rollback). Your data is never left half-restored.
snapshot.restoreWarning: The current state will be lost and replaced with the selected snapshot. This cannot be undone.
snapshot.title: Snapshots
tag.deleteTagConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the '{tagName}' tag? This operation cannot be undone.
tag.editor.name: Tag Name
tag.editor.numericDefinedNote: When min, max and step are all set, defined-value expansion in views can generate value nodes for this range (e.g. Rating 1–5 → 5 nodes).
tag.editor.simpleNote: A simple tag has only a name. It is the lightest tag, used just to mark an image as tagged or not.
tag.editor.simpleNote2: No value settings are needed. Check the appearance in the preview below.
tag.editor.typeCannotChange: Existing tag type cannot be changed
tag.editor.valueDomainClosedNote: This list is the authoritative value set. Images tagged with values outside the list are detected as "undefined" in views (existing values are kept; assignment itself is not rejected).
tag.editor.valueDomainSuggestNote: Predefined values are input suggestions only. Values outside the list can be assigned freely.
tag.filter.noTaggedImages: No tagged images in this folder
tag.preview.caption: How it looks on an image
tag.preview.label: Preview
tagging.commonTagsOfSelection: Tags common to the selected images
tagging.numericDialog.stepMismatch: Value does not match the step increment
tagging.numericDialog.title: Enter Numeric Tag Value
tagging.selectImagesHint: Select images to tag from the grid. Ctrl = multi-select / Shift = range select
trash.emptyConfirm: Permanently delete {count} images in the trash. Image files are not deleted (removed from the DB). This cannot be undone.
trash.purgeConfirm: Permanently delete {count} images. Image files are not deleted (removed from the DB). This cannot be undone.
view.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a description for this view
view.displayColumnsToFileList: Shown in the image tab file list
view.displayModeAllTip: Show all images under this node
view.displayModeUncTip: Show only images not classified further
view.saveColumnsNote: Saving the view applies this column layout to the image tab file list.
view.selectCollectionPrompt: Select a collection on the left
view.sortFromDisplayColumns: Choose from the view's display columns
view.unclassifiedEmptyHint: Every image here is classified under a child node
viewer.align.desc: How to align pages of differing height
viewer.fit.desc: How the image fits the screen
viewer.hAlign.desc: How to align images of differing width
viewer.info.scroll: Vertical scroll stacks images. Good for webtoons and photo sequences.
viewer.info.single: Single mode shows one image at a time. Use the arrow keys or the bottom bar to turn pages.
viewer.tagControl.action.forceLeftPage.d: Place only on the left page of the spread (insert a blank before if needed).
Place only on the right page of the spread (insert a blank before if needed).
viewer.tagControl.action.leftPageEmpty.d: Leave the left page of that spread blank and place the image on the right.
Leave the right page of that spread blank and place the image on the left.
viewer.tagControl.action.skip.desc: Exclude from display (remove from the sequence).
viewer.tagControl.action.skip.name: Skip
viewer.tagControl.action.spread.desc: One image occupies the whole spread (both pages).
viewer.tagControl.action.spread.name: Spread
viewer.tagControl.desc: Automatically control spread placement by image tags (e.g. excluding ad pages).
viewer.tagControl.mapping.card.subtitle: Edit action-to-tag assignments
viewer.tagControl.mapping.card.title: Mapping settings
viewer.tagControl.mapping.desc: Choose the tag to assign to each action. Images carrying an assigned tag are placed by that action.
viewer.tagControl.mapping.footer: Unassigned actions are disabled. A single tag can be assigned to multiple actions.
viewer.tagControl.mapping.title: Tag control mapping
workspace.deleteConfirmEmpty: Delete this workspace. This action cannot be undone.
workspace.deleteConfirmWithCount: Delete this workspace. Its {count} images will be removed from the space, but the images themselves are not deleted. This cannot be undone.
workspace.emptyHint: Enter work mode on the Images tab, select images and click 'Add' to gather them here in the default workspace.
workspace.noOtherSpaces: No other workspaces. Add one with '+'.
